parameters-en.Time: Adjusts the length of the entire 6-tap delay pattern. When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls how many times the 6-tap delay pattern repeats. When set to 0%, the pattern is heard only once; at 100%, the pattern cycles forever.
parameters-en.Pattern: Selects one of 8 preset patterns, all utilizing different sequences of filters and panning. Experiment to see which pattern sounds the best for your application.
parameters-en.Mode: Determines the type of repeat mode. "Delay" results in cleaner rhythmic patterns, with the same pattern repeating every sequence. "Echo" applies delays within the pattern itself, creating more of a sea of echoes, especially when Feedback is set high.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the delay repeats and the dry signal. At 0%, no repeats are heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
